topics.title: Artie's Food Poisoning and Health Concerns
topics.summary: The studio records a conversation regarding Artie's illness from eating leftover food, his fears about developing diabetes, and the prevalence of the name Emily.

topics.title: Radio Show Discussion on Pop Culture and Gaming
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation about the popularity of names, recent television shows like Heroes and The Bachelor, an interview with Nikki Sixx, and a humorous debate over Scott DePace's work schedule and his interest in Halo 3.

topics.title: Radio Industry Negotiations and Contract Disputes
topics.summary: The studio discusses internal tensions regarding talent contracts, the complexities of negotiating with high-profile personalities like Bubba the Jeffer-sonian, and the impact of potential satellite mergers on the industry.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Contract Negotiations and Talent Retention
topics.summary: The studio discusses the complexities of contract negotiations for talent like Bubba, the importance of retaining high-quality broadcasters in satellite radio, and the professional management strategies required to navigate industry conflicts.

topics.title: Dancing with the Stars and Jackass Video Game
topics.summary: The studio discusses various pop culture topics including a guest's appearance on Dancing with the Stars, upcoming projects for Artie Lange, and Steve-O's experiences with the development of the Jackass video game.

topics.title: Steve-O’s Lifestyle and Media Presence
topics.summary: The studio explores Steve-O's history with substance use, his reality show, interactions with celebrities like Lindsay Lohan, and the complexities of dating in the public eye.

topics.title: Steve-O Interview and Career Discussion
topics.summary: The show features an interview with Steve-O where he discusses his past legal troubles involving drug smuggling in Europe, his role in the Jackass franchise, and the promotion of his upcoming television series.

topics.title: Jerry Rice Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with former NFL wide receiver Jerry Rice regarding his upbringing in Mississippi, his transition from a self-described nerd to a professional athlete, and his experiences on the football field.

topics.title: Jerry Rice Career and Personal Life
topics.summary: The show features Jerry Rice discussing his NFL career, the challenges of being a Black athlete in the 1990s, his personal life and marriage, and his role as a spokesperson for a health drink.

topics.title: Jerry Rice Interview and Caller Tensions
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with football legend Jerry Rice regarding his career and a subsequent segment involving a series of confrontational voicemails from a caller named Wendy.

topics.title: Caller Interaction Regarding Personal Struggles
topics.summary: The show features a caller named Wendy who discusses her personal hardships, family dynamics, and various anecdotes while participating in a trivia game.

topics.title: Influence on Modern Media and Television
topics.summary: The studio discusses the host's influence on contemporary media, addressing specific instances of intellectual property theft by other shows and his role in loosening standards for language and subject matter in broadcasting.

topics.title: USO Rejection and Media News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a rejected proposal to perform for troops in Iraq, the rumored relationship between Robin and Jimmy Florentine based on his MySpace status, and updates regarding the XM Sirius merger.

topics.title: Satellite Mergers and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including satellite industry competition, the etymology of slang terms like "dink," legal issues involving Michael Vick, a survival story of a boy on an airplane wing, and a recording session featuring William Shatner.

topics.title: Current Events and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including the legal issues surrounding James Brown's estate, new airline regulations for in-flight movies, the conviction of a polygamous sect leader, international relations involving Iran and Cuba, celebrity news regarding Kevin Spacey and Demi Moore, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
